title: 장거리 커플이 말하는 장거리 커플
text:
Seoul-Yeosu long distance couple Yeosu-Seoul long distance couple Seoul-Gwangju long distance couple Q. Didn’t you worry when you first started long distance date? one two three! Man-At first NO, but now a little bit
Woman-I was really worried. Man-A little bit?
Woman-O I just can’t stop worrying. Because it’s long distance! Right! Little bit of worry just because we are long distance couple! Were you worried much? Well my friends said, “You are dating long distance?” Oh~ To you? Yes, to me. Now a little bit? Right! Because you are so popular. All those men just love you so much.. I can not help myself from worrying. What? Is that right? or not? Well maybe you just slept. When you first knew I live in Seoul, how did you feel? I thought, ‘why is it Seoul?’ It was like 3 hours? 4 hours and half? from Gwangju to Seoul. I mean, we can do nothing if it takes this long. So I was... You were worried? It is really far... and we can’t meet. Hey! you mean you weren’t that hard? ha ha ha I really had hard time... I am so tired.. ha ha ha ha ha lol Q. Do you tell when you are sick? one two three! Man-No
Woman-Sometimes! I really feel like baby When you are sick you call be with the baby voice. Because we are long distance couple, it takes 4 hours to.. You’ve got to come! Of course! That face! You always tell me When your knee hurts you tell me, When your arm hurts, you tell me. So what~?? So what~?? Well, it’s a little bit hard to go.. So what are you going to do? I will sing a

title: 장거리 커플이 말하는 장거리 커플
text:
ours to.. You’ve got to come! Of course! That face! You always tell me When your knee hurts you tell me, When your arm hurts, you tell me. So what~?? So what~?? Well, it’s a little bit hard to go.. So what are you going to do? I will sing a song. Wow.............. That’s really harsh.............. ha ha ha ha ha ha Go to hospital! Go to hospital if you are sick! Then let’s go together! That’s why I’m not telling you. I don’t want to go to hospital. Then don’t be sick! I will not tell you I am sick. Because I am not going to be sick. Is there time when you don’t tell me even though you are sick? Yes! I don’t have to. No! you should! Are you going to tell me~? Of course! Promise! Tell me when you are sick, okay? Promise first! Tell me when you are feeling bad! Signature! Really? My signature is expensive~ I want a stamp too. You~!! Copy! hey~ you!! Are you a kid or something? Coting! ha ha ha Q. What do you do when you want to see each other immediately? one two three! Man-Video call
Woman-Video call Man-text message
Woman-1. Call 2.video call 3.go and see him I say “I miss you” like a baby, with text message That’s right! He becomes a baby But I just miss you so much... So when I tell him stop whining, he says he can’t do anything with it and keep on whining Right! We video call a lot! And take a picture and send it to each other In the middle of the class, we take a picture of ‘importance of angle’ and send a picture like this Me? I don’t! You liar~ We haven’t seen each other for long until today. So I kept on telling myself “Only one week left!” and then, after one day, “Only 6 days left!” and “Finally tomorrow! I am so thrilled!” She take a picture like this But still, she’s pretty! If you keep on doing that... I will not send you a picture!!! What? no~~ I will not send it to

title: 장거리 커플이 말하는 장거리 커플
text:
ft!” and then, after one day, “Only 6 days left!” and “Finally tomorrow! I am so thrilled!” She take a picture like this But still, she’s pretty! If you keep on doing that... I will not send you a picture!!! What? no~~ I will not send it to you~ Q. Have you ever been worried because of each other’s opposite sex friend? one two three! man-Yes!!!!
Woman-A little bit Why are you not worried? Really? Even once? We don’t have that much of opposite sex friend. Hmmm... Yeah......... But first! The main problem is! She’s too pretty! Ha ha ha ha ha If you say like that, I can’t look up... Hey, really? You never mentioned anything! Well, when you... tell me that you will have lunch with female friends, um.... I have thoughts like, what if they are going through something? Going through something? I mean, even though you went to girls high, boys will come to your school to see you or something, right? Who....? Isn’t it right? No, never!!!!! If I were them, I　would go to your school everyday to see you. Q. What do you think of the saying ‘Out of sight, out of mind’? one two three! Man-Rihgt
Woman-agree a little bit but X It’s right? Yes Man-Soooo sayd..
Woman-case by case! Well, you always say that to me. I don't really mind about what people around me say. But when you say that to me. I think like ‘Is it really out of mind?’ It’s true but, there’s an exception! Us!! Except for us! Ah ha~ It’s just the general answer of that question because most people are. but not for us! Man- no!
Woman-At first O ->Now X Before starting long distance date, I thought it was natural to be out of mind when out of sight. But when I actually started dating, it wasn't like that Is it okay? Sure~ Well, actually, I don’t agree. We became more close. When we see each other after a long time. Right! We become more fond to each other. Q. Long distance date is OO! one two~ man-willpower!
woman-sweet and salty Sweet and salty! Man-money, patience
Woman-Not easy Man- Americano!
Woman-Kibum Americano? Well americano tastes a little bit bitter but it’s sweet after When we see each other after long time, it feels so sweet! Ahhhh! So it’s americano? It is really like that of americano. So you will be addicted to it. caffeine addiction~ addiction of you~ Yelim holic~♥ You will not message me because of that game things... No! I will delete it all! Don’t you lie~~~~!!! Please~~ forgive me~~~please~~~~?
